zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Calvert於1477年8月5日出生在英國英格蘭越可爾時，他的父親Alan Calvert20歲，母親Mary Tempest21歲。他於1495年與Margery Ewnes在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1559年2月9日在英國越可爾丹別 維斯可享年81歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter Calvert于1477年8月5日出生在英国英格兰越可爾时，他的父亲Alan Calvert20岁，母亲Mary Tempest21岁。他于1495年与Margery Ewnes在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1559年2月9日在英国越可爾丹別 維斯可享年81岁。

nameMeanings.name: Calvert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): occupational name from Middle English calfhirde, from Old English (Anglian) calf ‘calf’ + hierde ‘herdsman’.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Calvert was born on 5 August 1477, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Alan Calvert, was 20 and his mother, Mary Tempest, was 21. He married Margery Ewnes in 1495, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 9 February 1559, in Danby Wiske, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter Calvert est né le 5 août 1477, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Alan Calvert, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Mary Tempest, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Margery Ewnes en 1495, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 9 février 1559, à Danby Wiske, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 81 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter Calvert am 5. August 1477 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alan Calvert 20 und seine Mutter Mary Tempest 21. Er hat 1495 in England Margery Ewnes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 9. Februar 1559 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Danby Wiske, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Calvert è nato il il 5 agosto 1477 nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Alan Calvert, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Mary Tempest, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Margery Ewnes nel 1495, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 9 febbraio 1559, nel Danby Wiske, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 81 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter Calvertが1477年8月5日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Alan Calvertは20歳，母Mary Tempestは21歳であった。1495年にイギリスでMargery Ewnesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1559年2月9日にイギリスヨークシュアイアダンビー ウィスクで81歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter Calvert(이)가 1477년 8월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alan Calvert(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Tempest(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1495년 영국에서 Margery Ewnes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1559년 2월 9일 영국 요르크실르 단아비 와이스크에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Calvert nasceu em 5 de agosto de 1477, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Alan Calvert, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Mary Tempest, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Ewnes em 1495, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 9 de fevereiro de 1559, em Danby Wiske, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 81 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter Calvert родился 5 августа 1477 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Alan Calvert было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Tempest, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Ewnes в 1495 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 9 февраля 1559 г. в местности данби виск, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 81 год.
